app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.49 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for faster stream startup, better server recovery, and improved release stability.
releaseNotes: Stream startup now publishes priority and main server results progressively
The first working stream can start while other server groups keep warming
Server recovery keeps warmed candidates available in the selector
Main server waits were shortened so hanging endpoints do not block the selector
The self-healing stream route is now preferred before aggregate fallback
Fixed app page headers being clipped after returning from playback

items.title: The Cube 2.0.49
items.message: Playback startup and server recovery were improved so working streams appear faster.

items.title: Active Development Notice
items.message: THE CUBE is under heavy, active development. Expect frequent updates, sometimes multiple times a week, as features are added, bugs are fixed, and things get reworked. Breaking changes, UI shifts, and rough edges are part of the process right now.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
